asset.title: L4 Draft
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates how an AI agent handles a locked range by creating a draft instead of overwriting, using a clean step-by-step trace UI.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly shows the transition from a locked cell state to a drafted state with step-by-step agent explanations.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full sequence: initial locked state, lock denial, reading the value, and generating a draft.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed table layout with clear status indicators and a structured progress bar at the bottom.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and agent trace concept, showing versioned edits on financial metrics.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Looks like a high-fidelity interactive trace replay showing realistic system behavior.

legibility.evidence: High contrast text and clear labels make it easy to read even at smaller resolutions.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses collaborative lock contention issues common in financial modeling workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the system's fallback behavior when a write lock is denied.

observedEvidence: Draft status badge and updated value
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how the AI agent automatically drafts changes for a smart-merge when encountering a locked range in a collaborative sheet.
